title: Tender Molten Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A citrusy and molten Jamaican dish featuring dried apricots, perfect for a solo dinner, made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients. This curry is simmered to perfection to bring out the tender flavors of the chicken.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped dried apricots, lime juice, and chicken broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
